CustomField.description: Enter the number of days in 'Fee Due Day' to push the fee due date from the invoice or fee start/end date
CustomField.inlineHelpText: "Fixed Date": Enter a specific day(1-31) in the 'Fee Due Day' field. "Fixed Day in a Week": Select both a 'Day' and a 'Weekday Number' to specify, for e.g., the 2nd Tuesday of the month. "Relative": Enter a number of days in the 'Rent Due Day' field to set the due date relative to the Invoice Date, Rent Start/End Date.
CustomField.label: Fee Due Type

value.fullName: Relative Based On Fee Period Start Date
value.label: Relative Based On Fee Period Start Date

value.fullName: Relative Based On Fee Period End Date
value.label: Relative Based On Fee Period End Date
